error_signature: Can’t determine which item to use
context_key: append stage in Google Sheets node
title: Error during append stage in Google Sheets
symptom: When attempting to append data to Google Sheets, the error '[Can’t determine which item to use]' occurs, indicating multiple matches found.
applies_when: Using a code node to filter PDF files
not_this_if: No filtering is done in the code node
root_cause: The error arises because the workflow attempts to append multiple items simultaneously without properly distinguishing between them. The append operation expects a single item, but multiple items are being passed due to the way the workflow is structured.
fix_steps: Remove the if node that checks for duplicates after filtering PDFs
Add a Loop node to process each PDF file individually
Connect the Loop node to the Google Sheets append operation
agent_instruction: Use a Loop node to process each PDF file one by one before appending to Google Sheets.
